decoder.name: Imperva-MX
decoder.prematch: ^User logged in User \S+ logged in from \d+.\d+.\d+.\d+. High suser=\S+$|^Login failed Login failed for user \S+ \pIP: \d+.\d+.\d+.\d+\p Reason: \.* High suser=\S+$

decoder.name: Imperva-MX_fields
decoder.regex: User logged in User (\S+) logged in from (\d+.\d+.\d+.\d+). High suser=

decoder.name: Imperva-MX_fields
decoder.regex: Login failed Login failed for user (\S+) \pIP: (\d+.\d+.\d+.\d+)\p
